suggestion_zh: Activity 生命周期中空指针，检查 Activity/Fragment 是否已被销毁
suggestion_en: NPE in Activity lifecycle; check if Activity/Fragment has been destroyed

suggestion_zh: 视图操作空指针，检查 findViewById 或 ViewBinding 是否为 null
suggestion_en: NPE on view operation; check if findViewById or ViewBinding returned null

suggestion_zh: Intent 数据空指针，检查 getIntent() extras 是否存在
suggestion_en: NPE from Intent data; verify getIntent() extras before access

suggestion_zh: Bundle 数据空指针，检查 savedInstanceState 或 arguments 是否为 null
suggestion_en: NPE from Bundle; check if savedInstanceState or arguments is null

suggestion_zh: onSaveInstanceState 后提交 Fragment 事务，使用 commitAllowingStateLoss()
suggestion_en: Fragment transaction after onSaveInstanceState; use commitAllowingStateLoss()

suggestion_zh: Fragment 重复添加，检查 addToBackStack 或 isAdded 状态
suggestion_en: Fragment already added; check addToBackStack or isAdded state before adding

suggestion_zh: Fragment 未附加到 Activity，在 onAttach 后再访问 Activity
suggestion_en: Fragment not attached; access Activity only after onAttach

suggestion_zh: 缺少运行时权限，请在调用前动态申请权限
suggestion_en: Missing runtime permission; request permission before API call

suggestion_zh: 权限被拒绝，检查是否正确声明并申请了所需权限
suggestion_en: Permission denied; verify required permissions are declared and granted

suggestion_zh: 内存溢出，减少图片/Bitmap 大小，使用 inSampleSize 降采样
suggestion_en: Out of memory; reduce image/bitmap sizes, use inSampleSize for downsampling

suggestion_zh: 栈溢出，检查是否存在无限递归调用
suggestion_en: Stack overflow; check for infinite recursion in method calls

suggestion_zh: 类未找到，检查 ProGuard/R8 keep 规则或依赖是否正确打包
suggestion_en: Class not found; check ProGuard/R8 keep rules or dependency packaging

suggestion_zh: 主线程网络请求，使用协程(Dispatchers.IO)或异步调用
suggestion_en: Network on main thread; use coroutines (Dispatchers.IO) or async calls

suggestion_zh: SQLite 约束冲突，检查唯一键/外键约束
suggestion_en: SQLite constraint violation; check unique/foreign key constraints

suggestion_zh: Dialog/Toast 的 Activity 已销毁，检查 isFinishing/isDestroyed 再弹窗
suggestion_en: Bad window token; check Activity isFinishing/isDestroyed before showing Dialog/Toast

suggestion_zh: 远程进程已死亡，检查 Binder 调用的异常处理
suggestion_en: Remote process died; add try/catch for Binder IPC calls

suggestion_zh: 无权发送广播，Android 隐式广播限制，改用显式广播或 JobScheduler
suggestion_en: Broadcast not allowed; use explicit broadcasts or JobScheduler for background work

suggestion_zh: 无效的 ContentProvider URI，检查 URL 格式和 Provider 注册
suggestion_en: Unknown ContentProvider URL; verify URI format and Provider registration

suggestion_zh: 通知通道未创建或通知格式错误，Android 8+ 需要 NotificationChannel
suggestion_en: Bad notification; Android 8+ requires NotificationChannel, check notification config

suggestion_zh: RecyclerView 索引越界，检查 adapter 数据一致性，使用 DiffUtil
suggestion_en: RecyclerView index out of bounds; verify adapter data consistency, use DiffUtil
